title: Records and documents subject to examination
doc_html:
§327.  Records and documents subject to examination

All property records and reports and the invoices, receipts and other supporting documents therefor of each agency shall be subject to examination by the commissioner and the Legislative Auditor, and by their representatives.

Added by Acts 1964, No. 115, §1.
